description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, black touchscreen display bordered by a slim bezel, with a small front-facing camera and earpiece centered at the top. The back is a smooth, dark surface with two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of a matte or lightly textured material, with visible buttons for volume and power. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The device is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist design with slim side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black touchscreen display, slim bezel, and a small front-facing camera at the top center.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim profile and elongated volume and power buttons.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a smooth dark surface with two vertically aligned camera lenses and a flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the thin edge and additional button details.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and turned off, showing no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the upper left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on both sides: elongated volume and power buttons on the left and right edges.
